skills.name: action-cable

skills.name: architecture

skills.name: caching-strategies
skills.description: Implements Rails caching patterns — fragment, Russian doll, HTTP, low-level, and SolidCache — for performance optimization

skills.name: controllers

skills.name: debugging

skills.name: form-objects

skills.name: frame-problem
skills.description: Use this skill BEFORE writing code or creating a plan to detect XY problems early

skills.name: models

skills.name: project-setup

skills.name: security

skills.name: using-iron-horse
skills.description: Provides core Rails domain knowledge, architecture patterns, and an overview of available iron-horse skills

skills.name: writing-plans
